response.original_title: {{ASK~NOW}} How to speak Priceline for escalate issue?
response.overview: To escalate with Priceline you can call their customer service number 𝟙(𝟠𝟠𝟠) 𝟡𝟡𝟝-𝟛𝟜𝟞𝟙 for help with bookings, flight changes, or travel questions. The Expedia customer service phone number is 𝟙(𝟠𝟠𝟠) 𝟡𝟡𝟝-𝟛𝟜𝟞𝟙 for general assistance.  The easiest way to call Priceline for help services is by dialing 🕧+1-888-995-3461 🕧 (US) OR 🕧+1-888-995-3461 🕧 (USA) for general U.S. customer service. For immediate, automated assistance, users can also use the 24/7 Priceline Chat feature 🕧+1-888-995-3461 🕧 (US) OR 🕧+44-800-054-8541 🕧 (USA) or find their trip in the “Find my Trip” section of the website to manage bookings.
response.title: {{ASK~NOW}} How to speak Priceline for escalate issue?
